title: Service Usage Rules
subtitle: These rules describe the basic terms of using the platform, acceptable usage scenarios, and the restrictions accepted by the user during registration.

general.title: 1. General Terms
items: The service is provided for lawful use within the functionality made available to the user through the platform interface.
Users must use the service in good faith and must not take actions that may disrupt the site, infrastructure, or other users' accounts.

account.title: 2. User Account
items: The user is responsible for the accuracy of the data provided during registration and for keeping their credentials secure.
The user must not share account access with third parties without lawful grounds and must keep the password confidential.

usage.title: 3. Acceptable Use
items: The service must not be used for unlawful activity, infringement of third-party rights, bypassing access restrictions, abusing the platform's technical capabilities, or harming the infrastructure.
Attempts to gain unauthorized access to data, code, administrative areas, internal APIs, or other users' accounts are prohibited.

content.title: 4. User Data and Queries
items: The user is responsible for the data they enter into service forms, save in queries, or otherwise use within the available functionality.
The operator may limit or block actions that create excessive load, violate security requirements, or conflict with the intended purpose of the service.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
items: The operator takes reasonable measures to keep the service available and stable, but does not guarantee uninterrupted operation, error-free output, or suitability of the results for a specific user task.
The user is solely responsible for assessing the legality and appropriateness of using information obtained through the service.

changes.title: 6. Changes to the Rules
items: The operator may update these rules at any time.
The current version is published on this page and applies from the moment of publication unless stated otherwise.
